scope: voicebook TTS and audiobook generation research

current_decision.kokoro_quality_baseline: Use official hexgrad/Kokoro-82M-v1.1-zh KPipeline, not ONNX-direct samples
current_decision.high_quality_candidate: IndexTTS2 on a CUDA-capable remote worker
not_supported_now: Kokoro few-shot wav-to-voice-pack conversion with public inference packages

artifacts.title: 技术选型重审
artifacts.finding: Use rules + CSI for speaker attribution; move from old CosyVoice-300M-SFT to CosyVoice3 with IndexTTS2/cloud backends reserved.

artifacts.title: 有声书生态竞品研究
artifacts.finding: Automatic per-dialogue multi-character generation remains a gap; Audiobookshelf/M4B/subtitles are important ecosystem targets.

artifacts.title: TTS 模型全景
artifacts.finding: Quality: IndexTTS2/cloud at top, CosyVoice3 strong local candidate, Edge fastest baseline, Kokoro Mandarin weaker.

artifacts.title: 虚弱/愤怒/低语初版样例
artifacts.finding: CosyVoice3 best immediate emotion control; Edge fast but indirect; old Kokoro sample invalid for Mandarin quality.

artifacts.title: CosyVoice3 instruct-only emotion samples
artifacts.finding: Samples isolate instruct prompt behavior without explicit speed tuning.

artifacts.title: Bilibili IndexTTS2 feasibility
artifacts.finding: IndexTTS2 is a strong candidate but not runnable fairly on this CPU-only workspace; use remote CUDA for next benchmark.

artifacts.title: Kokoro v1.1 ONNX and voice-pack check
artifacts.finding: ONNX v1.1 can run with legacy IPA G2P, but public tooling does not expose wav-to-voice-pack training/export.

artifacts.title: Kokoro official v1.1 zh pipeline
artifacts.finding: Official KPipeline(lang_code='z') is the fair Chinese quality path; ONNX-direct is not equivalent.

artifacts.title: Four-engine gender/state playback matrix
artifacts.finding: 24 samples: Kokoro official, Kokoro ONNX, Cosy instruct, Edge across male/female and weak/angry/whisper.

artifacts.title: Fanren CosyVoice dialogue runtime
artifacts.finding: All quoted dialogue with local CPU CosyVoice3 takes about 45-67 days.

artifacts.title: Fanren EdgeTTS full-book runtime
artifacts.finding: EdgeTTS full-book draft with concurrency 4 takes about 2.7 days expected, 5-6 days conservative.

artifacts.title: Fanren single-chapter Cosy/Edge runtime
artifacts.finding: Normal chapter: Cosy about 1.8h, Edge about 1.3m.
